nodes.label: Tests for the combined /reasoning command.  Covers both reasoning effort level
Create a minimal CLI stub with the reasoning attributes.
Setting an effort level should update reasoning_config.
Invalid arguments should be rejected (parsed returns None).
With no args, should show current state (no crash).
Verify reasoning extraction from the messages list.
Verify long reasoning is collapsed to 10 lines in the box.
Test _extract_reasoning with real provider response formats.
Test _build_assistant_message extracts inline <think> blocks as reasoning     w
Create a mock API response message.
When structured API reasoning exists, inline think blocks should NOT override.
Reasoning callback should fire when reasoning is extracted from inline think blo
Verify /reasoning is in the COMMANDS dict.
Simulate the full pipeline: extraction -> result dict -> display.
_build_assistant_message should not re-fire reasoning_callback when     reasoni
When streaming already fired reasoning deltas, the post-stream         _build_a
When streaming is active, callback should NEVER fire from         _build_assist
When no streaming is active, callback always fires for structured         reaso
Post-response reasoning display should be suppressed when reasoning     was alr
The turn flag should be reset at the start of a new user turn.         This hap
